name: Adams Grain Company
description: Come play pickleball at Adams Grain Company in Glenville, MN! You'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Albert Lea Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Albert Lea Family YMCA in Albert Lea, MN! There are 3 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Free for members, $5 for non members

name: Frank Hall Park
description: Frank Hall Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Albert Lea, MN. There are 10 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Knutson Oil Company
description: Knutson Oil Company is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Glenville, MN. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.
